title: mutisia coccinea
intro: Mutisia coccinea is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Andes mountains in South America. It is a shrub-like plant with red, daisy-like flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues. Mutisia coccinea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
